title: Tameable Fox
description: This mod allows you to tame foxes like wolves or cats
body:
This mod is in beta, so it could be buggy, but at the moment you can tame it.

# **Feature list:**
- NOT all the foxes you can find in the world could be tamed;
- To tame it you need sweet berries;
- You can order sit it, but the fox, even when tamed, will remain capricious and will walk around the districts, but will not go far away;
- When you sit her down, she stops following you and can start walking around, and the next time you tell her to sit down, she will start following you;
- Some other features I forgot to mention here.


# **To do list:**
_If the mod becomes even a little popular and I notice that someone needs it, there is a list of things that can be added_
- Collars like dogs;
- AI improvements;
- Maybe custom models and more animations.

# **Idea History**
- My friend 3 years ago metioned that it would be cool to be able to tame foxes like cats. No one really took this idea seriously. So 3 years passed and we had something like a tradition, because we lived in different cities, we went into the same game on the same server on New Year’s Eve. This game was StalCraft for 2 years, but the game has changed a lot, the vibe of the old game is gone and we decided to get together in Minecraft this time and I decided to implement this idea. Now this is not a stupid joke but reality)

# **Honorable mention**
## **My friends**:
- _chaosit_ the idea
- kurama322 for rock & stone
## **Elder brain**
- dod23 minor bugfixes

_Project is open source and you can write me directly through Discord for any questions or ideas._ programmer.exe
